title: Bound application chunks by full SCHC packet
description: Transport spec applies the 1281-byte mandatory receiver capacity to application chunks, but the limit covers the complete SCHC packet including compressed headers and CoAP metadata. Specify payload budget after overhead.
close_reason: Bounded SCHC datagram size to 1281 bytes in FragmentSender (Rust/Python) and schc_fragmenter_init (C). Updated constants, added validation, extended tests. Cargo test, clippy, ruff, Python pytest all pass. Vectors covered by roundtrip tests.
